title: Epitaph On William Nicol.
content:
Ye maggots, feast on Nicol's brain,
            For few sic feasts ye've gotten;
        And fix your claws in Nicol's heart,
            For deil a bit o't's rotten.
meaning:
"Epitaph On William Nicol." is a quintessential example of Robert Burns's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
